descriptionText: Sunreef 60 Spice of Life For Sale 2025The Sunreef 60 Spice of Life For Sale 2025 presents an appealing opportunity for anyone searching for a well‑kept sailing catamaran in the 60‑foot range. Known for its balance of comfort, performance, and thoughtful layout, the Sunreef 60 model continues to attract sailors seeking long‑distance cruising capability paired with generous onboard living spaces. Spice of Life follows this tradition, offering a dependable platform that has been maintained in good condition and equipped with systems suited to both private cruising and light charter use.The Sunreef 60 Spice of Life For Sale 2025 is widely appreciated for its practical deck plan, stable hull form, and well‑protected cockpit areas. On Spice of Life, these qualities are complemented by her hard top, full set of covers, and the convenience of Lazyjacks and a Lazy Bag, making sail handling manageable for a small crew. With a LOA of 18.29 metres and a 10.06‑metre beam, she provides a spacious environment without becoming cumbersome to manoeuvre. Her seating capacity for ten and accommodation for up to six guests makes her well‑proportioned for family cruising or hosting friends.The interior layout offers three guest cabins and one crew cabin, each with its own head, ensuring privacy and comfort during longer passages. The saloon and galley areas are fitted with equipment that supports life aboard, including air conditioning, a dishwasher, deep freezer, washing machine, and a range of galley appliances. Practical features such as a watermaker, bow and stern thrusters, electric heads, and multiple refrigeration units further contribute to ease of use during extended cruising.Powered by twin Nanni N4.140 engines (135 hp each) with three‑blade stainless steel propellers, Spice of Life provides steady performance under power. Her fuel capacity of 1,750 litres and 800‑litre fresh‑water tank allow for longer intervals between stops. For energy and electrical demands, she comes with a generator, inverter, solar panels, and shore power inlet.Her electronics package includes essential navigation and communication tools such as AIS, radar, autopilot, depthsounder, GPS, plotter, and VHF, along with comforts like a flatscreen TV and cockpit speakers. Safety and outdoor usability are supported by features such as the hydraulic bathing platform, gangway, liferaft, and tender. The teak cockpit and sidedecks provide a pleasant and practical exterior environment for daily life aboard.Sailors will appreciate her fully battened mainsail, furling genoa, and gennaker/cruising spinnaker, offering a versatile sail plan for varying conditions. An electric winch assists with handling, contributing to straightforward operation.Overall, the Sunreef 60 Spice of Life For Sale 2025 represents a solid choice for those seeking a capable cruising catamaran that has been maintained in good condition. She offers the right combination of space, equipment, and usability for comfortable life at sea.Specifications:• Engines: 2 × Nanni N4.140 (135 hp), 3‑blade stainless steel propellers • LOA: 18.29 m • Beam: 10.06 m • Fuel: 1 × 1,750 L • Fresh water: 800 L • Seating capacity: 10 • Maximum passengers: 6 • Accommodation: 3 guest cabins, 1 crew cabin • Heads: 3 guest heads, 1 crew head • Covers: Hard Top, Lazy Bag, Lazyjacks • Electrical: generator, inverter, shore power inlet • Electronics: AIS, autopilot, cockpit speakers, compass, depthsounder, flatscreen TV, GPS, log‑speedometer, navigation centre, plotter, radar, VHF • Inside equipment: air conditioning, battery charger, bow thruster, deep freezer, dishwasher, electric bilge pump, electric head, watermaker, hot water, microwave, oven, refrigerator, stern thruster, washing machine • Outside equipment: cockpit cushions, cockpit shower, cockpit table, electric winch, gangway, hydraulic bathing platform, liferaft, solar panel, swimming ladder, teak cockpit, teak sidedecks, tender • Sails: fully battened mainsail, furling genoa, gennaker/cruising spinnaker
descriptionHtml:
Sunreef 60 Spice of Life For Sale 2025

The Sunreef 60 Spice of Life For Sale 2025 presents an appealing opportunity for anyone searching for a well‑kept sailing catamaran in the 60‑foot range. Known for its balance of comfort, performance, and thoughtful layout, the Sunreef 60 model continues to attract sailors seeking long‑distance cruising capability paired with generous onboard living spaces. Spice of Life follows this tradition, offering a dependable platform that has been maintained in good condition and equipped with systems suited to both private cruising and light charter use.

The Sunreef 60 Spice of Life For Sale 2025 is widely appreciated for its practical deck plan, stable hull form, and well‑protected cockpit areas. On Spice of Life, these qualities are complemented by her hard top, full set of covers, and the convenience of Lazyjacks and a Lazy Bag, making sail handling manageable for a small crew. With a LOA of 18.29 metres and a 10.06‑metre beam, she provides a spacious environment without becoming cumbersome to manoeuvre. Her seating capacity for ten and accommodation for up to six guests makes her well‑proportioned for family cruising or hosting friends.

The interior layout offers three guest cabins and one crew cabin, each with its own head, ensuring privacy and comfort during longer passages. The saloon and galley areas are fitted with equipment that supports life aboard, including air conditioning, a dishwasher, deep freezer, washing machine, and a range of galley appliances. Practical features such as a watermaker, bow and stern thrusters, electric heads, and multiple refrigeration units further contribute to ease of use during extended cruising.

Powered by twin Nanni N4.140 engines (135 hp each) with three‑blade stainless steel propellers, Spice of Life provides steady performance under power. Her fuel capacity of 1,750 litres and 800‑litre fresh‑water tank allow for longer intervals between stops. For energy and electrical demands, she comes with a generator, inverter, solar panels, and shore power inlet.

Her electronics package includes essential navigation and communication tools such as AIS, radar, autopilot, depthsounder, GPS, plotter, and VHF, along with comforts like a flatscreen TV and cockpit speakers. Safety and outdoor usability are supported by features such as the hydraulic bathing platform, gangway, liferaft, and tender. The teak cockpit and sidedecks provide a pleasant and practical exterior environment for daily life aboard.

Sailors will appreciate her fully battened mainsail, furling genoa, and gennaker/cruising spinnaker, offering a versatile sail plan for varying conditions. An electric winch assists with handling, contributing to straightforward operation.

Overall, the Sunreef 60 Spice of Life For Sale 2025 represents a solid choice for those seeking a capable cruising catamaran that has been maintained in good condition. She offers the right combination of space, equipment, and usability for comfortable life at sea.

Specifications:

• Engines: 2 × Nanni N4.140 (135 hp), 3‑blade stainless steel propellers
• LOA: 18.29 m
• Beam: 10.06 m
• Fuel: 1 × 1,750 L
• Fresh water: 800 L
• Seating capacity: 10
• Maximum passengers: 6
• Accommodation: 3 guest cabins, 1 crew cabin
• Heads: 3 guest heads, 1 crew head
• Covers: Hard Top, Lazy Bag, Lazyjacks
• Electrical: generator, inverter, shore power inlet
• Electronics: AIS, autopilot, cockpit speakers, compass, depthsounder, flatscreen TV, GPS, log‑speedometer, navigation centre, plotter, radar, VHF
• Inside equipment: air conditioning, battery charger, bow thruster, deep freezer, dishwasher, electric bilge pump, electric head, watermaker, hot water, microwave, oven, refrigerator, stern thruster, washing machine
• Outside equipment: cockpit cushions, cockpit shower, cockpit table, electric winch, gangway, hydraulic bathing platform, liferaft, solar panel, swimming ladder, teak cockpit, teak sidedecks, tender
• Sails: fully battened mainsail, furling genoa, gennaker/cruising spinnaker
